description: Style NoteIn the past, looking good meant compromising on your comfort, but now, jockey briefs for women aims to change all that. jockey uses a variety of extra comfy and stretchy fabrics to create the most fashionable women's underwear styles. You can be sure that when you wear panties from Jockey, you're choosing all-day comfort. Now, looking good can be comfortable too!Product DetailsBoy leg shorts Fit fabulously just below the waistlineModern low rise styling with modest leg coverageFashionable ultra soft logo elastic that leaves no marks on your skinAvailable in irresistible colours to compliment youMaterial and CareCotton/elastaneMachine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanFlat dry in shade
